## What this PR does

One or two sentences.

## Type

- [ ] Pattern contribution (new file in `patterns/`)
- [ ] Definition / spec change (edits to `README.md` or required properties)
- [ ] Worked example (added to README's worked-examples list)
- [ ] Editorial / docs / CI

## Checklist (pattern PRs)

- [ ] Pattern file follows the required sections: Problem, Mechanism, Required properties, Canonical example, When it fits, When it doesn't.
- [ ] A shipped worked example is linked.
- [ ] All three required properties are addressed (versioned artifact, regeneration cadence, declared coverage path).

## Checklist (spec PRs)

- [ ] Changes are reflected consistently across `README.md` and any affected files in `patterns/`.
- [ ] If a definition shifted, the version line at the bottom of `README.md` is bumped.
